Operation 'query' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate what action is performed or what data can be retrieved. Description lacks specificity about function types, parameter requirements, and return value variations. AI agents need to understand the function parameter's role as a router to different data types (stocks, forex, crypto, technical indicators, economic indicators, fundamental data, news/sentiment). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose as a multi-function endpoint, provides examples of supported functions aligned with API tags, explains parameter variability, and specifies authentication requirements for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Single endpoint for all Alpha Vantage API functions. The 'function' parameter determines which data is returned. See documentation for all supported functions and their parameters.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve financial data using function parameter
data.description_suggestion: Universal endpoint for accessing all Alpha Vantage financial data services. The required 'function' parameter specifies the data type to retrieve (e.g., TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY, GLOBAL_QUOTE, FX_DAILY, CRYPTO_RATING, technical indicators, economic indicators, news, earnings, or fundamental data). Additional parameters vary by function and may include symbol, interval, time period, and data format preferences. Returns time series data, quotes, technical analysis, economic indicators, or company fundamentals depending on the selected function. Requires valid API key for authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate what action is performed or what data can be retrieved. Description lacks specificity about function types, parameter requirements, and return value variations. AI agents need to understand the function parameter's role as a router to different data types (stocks, forex, crypto, technical indicators, economic indicators, fundamental data, news/sentiment). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose as a multi-function endpoint, provides examples of supported functions aligned with API tags, explains parameter variability, and specifies authentication requirements for better AI agent decision-making.
